title: AI scientist, DNA editors, AI NPCs, new Qwen, open-source robots, new video editors: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube news segment covering recent advances across AI research and tooling, including new models from Qwen, robotics frameworks like LeRobot and Lance, audio generation with Stable Audio 3, and specialized systems for DNA editing, video generation, and scientific research assistance. The host highlights dozens of open-source and proprietary tools released or updated in the AI space.
